title: carex × boenninghausiana
intro: Carex × boenninghausiana, also known as Boenninghausenia sedge, is a hybrid plant species of the Carex genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat bronchitis and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Carex × boenninghausiana is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
